docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEAUCHAMP, LISA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1230 EGBERT, LOWER UNIT, STAYED UNTIL JUL-01-1995, PLTF WAIVES MONEY JDMT, BUT KEEPS ANY DEPOSITS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRINSELL, RAYMOND
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT BEAUCHAMP, LISA
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT BEAUCHAMP, LISA
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT BEAUCHAMP, LISA

PRO TEM JUDGE: ALLEN SINGER:CLERK:ECLAVERIA:RPTR:BRENDA FIELDS 2:55PM:C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PRESENT:PLFF'S COUNSEL JACK FENDELL; DEFT. LISA BEAUCHAMP PRESENT WITH HER SPECIAL COUNSEL JAMES A. MCELROY. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: THIS IS A JUDGMENT FOR PLFF AGAINST DEFT. PLFF SHALL HAVE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1230 EGBERT(LOWER),SF,CA,WITH EXECUTION STAYED TO 7/1/95; WRIT TO ISSUE AND POSTING OF NOTICE BE DONE; JUDGMENT STAYED CONDITION THAT DEFT PAY $322.54 ON MAY 16,1995; PLFF WAIVES RENT TO 7/1/95, PROVIDED DEFT VACATES PREMISES BY 7/1/95; PLFF AGREES TO DISMISS CASE IF DEFT VACATES BY 7/1/95; PARTIES AGREE TO GENERAL RELEASES, WAIVER OF ALL CLAIMS; EACH SIDE BEARS HIS OWN FEES AND COST PLFF PREPARES JUDGMENT AND GIVES DEFT FIRST BEFORE GIVEN TO COURT.
